CASE ASSIGNED TO JUDICIAL MEDIATION BEFORE JUDGE HAROLD E KAHN. JUDICIAL MEDIATION SET FOR JUN-18-2009 AT 3:00 PM IN DEPT. 604. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS CHASE COMMUNICATION CA LLC, AND JULIE CHASE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT DEFENDANT'S LEGITIMATE BASIS IS PRETEXTUAL. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HER DECLARATION AS TO HER RESPONSIBILITY, DISCRETION, OVERSIGHT AND JOB FUNCTIONS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS REAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO BREACH OF AN ORAL AGREEMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350. OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT DEFENDANT'S LEGITMATE BASIS IS PRETEXTUAL. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 2 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HER DECLARATION AS TO HER RESPONSIBILITY, DISCRETION, OVERSIGHT AND JOB FUNCTIONS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 4 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS REAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO BREACH OF AN ORAL AGREEMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350. OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J.
